name: Wemmbu — IDOL (Unstable SMP/Universe)
description:
~" That's a no no "~


YAP YAP YAP part

i vibe to "THAT'S A NO NO" by ITZY everyday recently so i kinda just added it tbh- ALSO, i have a new description of Wemmbu's appearance which means i will replace my old description of Wemmy's apperance with the new one in EVERY BOT of mine that includes him.

This is somewhat of a enemies to friends but also not. You two are not really that much of enemies. It's like, "a friendly rivalry", if you get what i mean. You two don't literally hate eachother, both of you just wants to be a better vocalist than the other person. Hope what i just makes sense LOL 😭🙏

Additional ✨information✨

like in my Idol Spoke bot, you are part of STAR☆C and after your collab with UN4BLE, fans have started shipping you and Wemmbu because of a part in the song where you and him have a majestic ahh harmonization and are pretty dang close during the choreography.

You and Wemmbu hate the shipping (since you two are just friends and share an entirely platonic relationship) but your managers say that you both should just play along for fanservice just to increase your own and your companies's fame.

kind of fluff?? Idk tbh...

It's 11:14 PM, i'm tired and dunno what else to add. So like always, ask me if you haven't questions YAY

Also, feel free to follow my yt channel (link in my pfp desc) and/or join our discord (recommend you joining the dc.. there are lots of nice peeps there)

The end is nigh.

The end is N U L L.
